dc:title: Synthetic phenotypic sample for the TOGETHER cohort

columns.name: Patient_ID
columns.description: Unique anonymized identifier assigned to each patient

columns.name: Sample_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for each biological sample

columns.name: Tissue_Type
columns.description: Type of tissue from which the sample was obtained (e.g., tumour or normal)

columns.name: Age
columns.description: Age of the patient at the time of sample collection (years)

columns.name: Sample_Preservation
columns.description: Method used to preserve the biological sample

columns.name: Anatomical_Location
columns.description: Anatomical site from which the sample was collected

columns.name: Family_History_Cancer
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has a family history of cancer (Yes/No)

columns.name: MMR_IHC_status
columns.description: Mismatch repair protein status determined by immunohistochemistry
